_about: CURATED extractor input: per-dialogue-block speaker attribution (sp = char-DB cid), narration markers and real player forks (choice), keyed by stage file base name -> block file offset. Produced by a one-time VM-walk + review campaign, completed by recovering the orphaned speaker/narration annotations of the pre-refactor stage files (stale display-name labels resolved to cids against the live ROM nameplates). Not (yet) derivable from the bytecode alone. Consumed by utils/extract (stage dumps) and surfaced in data/jp.
